assertion_results.text: Step 0 extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table and parses rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped (§1.77)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 33-39 contain a 'Deployment Context Lookup' section that shows the Source Repositories table with a 'Deployment Context' column. rhtpa-backend is listed with deployment context 'customer-shipped'. Line 39: 'The affected component (`pscomponent:org/rhtpa-server`) maps to source repository **rhtpa-backend**. Deployment context: **customer-shipped**.' The file is labeled 'Step 1' rather than 'Step 0', but the extraction of the Deployment Context column and parsing of rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped is explicitly performed.

assertion_results.text: Step 1 looks up the deployment context for the affected repository and records customer-shipped as part of the CVE metadata
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md is titled 'Step 1 -- Data Extraction'. Lines 33-41 contain a 'Deployment Context Lookup' section that looks up the deployment context for rhtpa-backend (the affected repository) and records 'customer-shipped'. Line 39: 'Deployment context: **customer-shipped**.' Line 41: 'This deployment context will be used in Step 8 (Remediation) to generate coordination guidance in remediation task descriptions.'

assertion_results.text: Remediation task descriptions include a Coordination Guidance subsection in Implementation Notes with customer-shipped guidance text
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md contains four remediation tasks. Each includes a '## Implementation Notes' section followed by a '### Coordination Guidance' subsection with customer-shipped guidance. Task 1 (lines 39-50), Task 2 (lines 92-98), Task 3 (lines 152-160), Task 4 (lines 208-212) all follow this structure. The guidance text states 'This component is shipped to customers.'

assertion_results.text: The customer-shipped guidance mentions coordinating with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure
assertion_results.evidence: All four Coordination Guidance subsections contain identical text (e.g., remediation.md line 50): 'This component is shipped to customers. Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure. Fix must be released via a security advisory with explicit CVE-to-component mapping.' This explicitly mentions all three required elements: CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure.
